description.en: One of the world's rarest gazelles, found only around Lake Qinghai in China.
description.zh: 世界上最稀有的羚羊之一，仅发现于中国青海湖周边。

anatomy.en: They are small gazelles with a white patch on their rump and horns that curve inward at the tips.
anatomy.zh: 它们是小型羚羊，臀部有一块白斑，角尖向内弯曲。

ecology_and_behavior.en: They are amazing jumpers, easily leaping over fences. They eat various alpine grasses and shrubs.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它们是惊人的跳跃者，能轻松跳过围栏。它们以各种高山草类和灌木为食。

habitat_and_distribution.en: They live in the high-altitude grasslands and semi-deserts surrounding Lake Qinghai.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 它们生活在青海湖周围的高海拔草原和半荒漠地带。
